mapper.sql: id, merchant_id, channel_id, channel_rate, `status`, min_amount, max_amount
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id,a.merchant_id,a.channel_id,b.channel_code,b.channel_name,a.`status`,a.channel_rate,a.merchant_overtime,a.base_deposit,a.weight, a.min_amount,a.max_amount,a.agent_contrl FROM ct_merchant_channel a JOIN ct_channel b on a.channel_id = b.id WHERE b.del_flag = 0 AND b.`status` = 0 AND a.merchant_id = #{merchantId}
and a.channel_id = #{channelId}
